title: How DK Shivakumar wrestled back the Karnataka Chief Minister’s chair after being snubbed in 2013 and 2023
description: Siddaramaiah resigned as Karnataka Chief Minister, paving the way for deputy DK Shivakumar to take over. This leadership shift concludes a fierce struggle between their factions, with past tensions over cabinet roles and unresolved claims of a rotational agreement complicating the transition.
